items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.snippet: Albemarle's fair value sits at $212.74, well above the last close of $160.35. However, Albemarle's story carries clear risks if lithium prices stay weak for longer or industry oversupply keeps pressure on margins.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Investment opinion 'Buy' - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB) from 'High Risk' to 'Buy'. The target price remains at $225. The market is underestimating Albemarle's growth potential despite the recent weakness in spot lithium prices. Citi assessed that the possibility of the lithium

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate 'Pick and Shovel' Play on Elon Inc.
items.snippet: ALB controls roughly 15-17% of global lithium supply. Lithium prices crashed over 80% from their late-2022 highs to early-2024 lows. Now that lithium prices are recovering, ALB is ready to run. Albemarle sold its Ketjen business for $670 million and used proceeds to pay down debt
